question: What is a time-of-flight (TOF) mass analyzer?
options: Measures current at fixed magnetic field
Measures the time for ions to travel a flight tube, proportional to sqrt(m/z)
Scans magnetic field to select masses
explanation: TOF analyzers accelerate ions with a fixed potential and measure their flight time. Lighter ions arrive first. Modern reflectron TOF achieves >20,000 resolution.
